Batt_voltage_mes.comment: Battery voltage feed on KL30  measured by PEB

APCStatus.comment: APC feedback status from EVC  (for diagnostic)

Volt_APCPEB_veh_status.comment: APC wire  status  from USM to PEB

DCHighVoltage.comment: Voltage value of the HV Network

DCDCActivation.comment: On/Off  request of the DCDC from EVC

DCDCVoltageRegulation.comment: Voltage demand for the DCDC converter  from the EVC

DCDCLowVoltage.comment: Voltage value of the LV Network  by the DCDC converter

DCDCCurrentOutput.comment: Current value on the LV Network for the DCDC Converter

DCDCCurrentInput.comment: Current value on the HV Network  for the DCDC Converter only

DCDCTemp.comment: Combination of all the DCDC converter sensors, so in %

DCDCDefault.comment: Failure class of the DCDC converter (A, B, C & D)

PEBDCDCServLampRequest.comment: service lamp alert request , following DCDC barrier security loose

InverterActivation.comment: On/Off power train activation request from EVC

PowerTrainCurrent.comment: Combinated current value on the HV Network  of Inverter and Excitation

Current Ph U.comment: HV side phase U current measure

Current Ph V.comment: HV side phase V current measure

Current Ph W.comment: HV side phase W current measure

ElecTorqueRequest.comment: Torque demand for the power train from the EVC

PEBTorque.comment: Calculated torque by PEB for EVC

ElecMachineMaxMotorTorque.comment: Maximal available calculated torque in motor mode

ElecMachineMaxGenTorque.comment: Maximal available calculated torque in generator mode

InverterTemp.comment: Combination of inverter and Excitation temperatures, so in %

B_PebDischarge_sch_req.comment: Active discharge request  from EVC to PEB

PEBActiveDischarge.comment: Effective active discharge feedback to EVC

ElecMAchineWorkingMode.comment: Mode of the power train (motor or generator)

ElecMachineDefault.comment: Failure class of the power train  (A, B, C & D)

PEBMotorServLampRequest.comment: service lamp alert request , following power train barrier security loose

PEBMotorStopLampRequest.comment: stop lamp alert request , following power train barrier security loose

lists.0: Device and failure type ODB codding
lists.20: circuit short to ground or open
lists.21: circuit short to battery or open
lists.38: signal rate of change below threshold
lists.39: signal rate of change above threshold
lists.40: signal bias level / zero adjustment failure
lists.101: signal has too few transitions / events
lists.102: signal has too many transitions / events
lists.130: alive / sequence counter incorrect / not updated
lists.131: value of signal protection calculation incorrect

lists.4178: PEB Failure Class B with safety alert
lists.4163: OV flags Data Received by CAN
lists.4118: INV phase W internal current sensor
lists.4117: INV phase V internal current sensor
lists.4116: INV phase U internal current sensor
lists.4109: DCDC Sigma delta voltage sensor 14V side
lists.4107: DCDC internal Driver Board Temp sensor
lists.4106: DCDC internal Power module Temp sensor
lists.4103: PEB HV DC link discharge failure
lists.4100: Internal voltage sensor on HV side

DTCExtendedData.Mileage.comment: Description of the extendedData Mileage (use by Failure Page to decode data)

DTCExtendedData.AgingCounter.comment: Description of the extendedData AgingCounter (use by Failure Page to decode data)

DTCExtendedData.DTCOccurrenceCounter.comment: Description of the extendedData DTCOccurenceCounter (use by Failure Page to decode data)

VerlogStatus.comment: status verlog from PEB to EVC (locked or not)

InterlockBatt.comment: Interlock plug service status, from LBC (condition for reprogramming)

Verrou logiciel - moteur non tournant à cause d'un problème CAN avec la BCM
